---

title: "01_Setup_Configurations"

author: "NAMLink"

format: html

---


```{r}
#| echo: true
#| warning: false
#| message: false


rm(list=ls())

library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
library(openxlsx)
library(purrr)
library(esqlabsR)

datdir <- "../../01_Data/"
moddir <- "../../00_Models/PKML_Files"   # flat combined folder (monkey + human)
```



```{r}
# dat <- read.csv(file.path(datdir, "Monkey", "mAb_data.csv"), stringsAsFactors = F, na.strings=F)
# 
# params <- read.xlsx(file.path(datdir, "Monkey", "Parameters.xlsx"), sheet=1)
# 
# unique(dat$Molecule)
# 
# keepers <-params %>%  pull(`Drug.Name`) %>% unique(.)
# 
# plotdat <- dat %>% filter(Molecule %in% keepers) %>%
#   ### Take single dose data only (after 28 days, multiple dose data may be included based on the review of plots)
#   filter(Species=="NHP", Time < 28*24) %>%
#   filter(Time < 7*24 | Molecule != "Pembrolizumab") %>% # Pembro seems to be every 7 day dosing (Not needed)
#   filter(Measurement >=2 | ! Molecule %in% c("Pembrolizumab", "Nipocalimab")) %>%
#   filter(Time < 14*24 | Molecule != "Atezolizumab") %>% # Atezoli 5 mg/kg seems to be every 14 day dosing (Not needed)
#   filter(Time > 0) %>%
#   mutate(Subject.Id = subject.Id2) %>%
#   select(-subject.Id2) %>%
#   arrange(Molecule, Dose, Subject.Id, Time) %>%
#   group_by(Molecule, Dose, Subject.Id, Time) %>%
#   slice(1) %>%
#   ungroup()
# 
# ggplot(plotdat, aes(x=Time, y=Measurement, color=factor(Dose), group=Subject.Id)) +
#   geom_line() +
#   facet_wrap(~Molecule, scales="free") +
#   scale_y_log10() +
#   theme_bw()
# write.csv(plotdat, file.path(datdir, "Monkey", "mAb_data_clean.csv"), row.names=F, na="")

#### Human
# dat <- read.csv(file.path(datdir, "Human", "mAb_data_human.csv"), stringsAsFactors = F, na.strings=F)
# # params <- read.xlsx(file.path(datdir, "Human", "Parameters_human.xlsx"), sheet=1)
#  
# plotdat <- dat %>%  
#   ### Take single dose data only 
#   filter(Species=="Human", Time < 28*24, Molecule!="Pembrolizumab") %>%
#   arrange(Molecule, Dose, Subject.Id, Time) 
# 
# time_bins <- c(0, 0.25, 1, 2, 4, 6, 12, 24, 48, seq(48, 24 * 28, 24 * 2))
# 
# Tocidat <- plotdat %>%
#   filter(Molecule == "Tocilizumab") %>%
#   mutate(
#     Time_bin = time_bins[map_int(Time, ~ which.min(abs(time_bins - .x)))]
#   ) %>%
#   group_by(Species, Molecule, Dose, Time = Time_bin) %>%
#   summarize(
#     Measurement = median(Measurement),
#     .groups = "drop"
#   ) %>% ungroup() %>% filter(Time!=336) %>%
#   full_join(., plotdat %>% filter(Molecule=="Tocilizumab") %>% select(-Time, -Measurement) %>% slice(1) %>% ungroup())
# 
# plotdat <- bind_rows(plotdat %>% filter(Molecule!="Tocilizumab"), Tocidat)%>%
#   arrange(Molecule, Dose, Subject.Id, Time) 
# 
# ggplot(plotdat, aes(x=Time, y=Measurement, color=factor(Dose), group=Subject.Id)) +
#   geom_line() +
#   facet_wrap(~Molecule, scales="free") +
#   scale_y_log10() +
#   theme_bw()
# write.csv(plotdat, file.path(datdir, "Human", "mAb_data_clean.csv"), row.names=F, na="")

```

# Auto-Generate All 3 Configuration Files

Auto-generates **Applications.xlsx**, **ModelParameters.xlsx**, and
**Scenarios.xlsx** for all 8 molecules in `mAb_data_clean.csv`.
Uses `Parameters.xlsx` as the parameter source. Run after the
data-cleaning section above.

```{r}
#| warning: false
#| message: false

# Paths relative to Scripts/ folder (3 levels up to reach Test2/01_Data/)
datdir  <- "../../01_Data"
confdir <- "../Configurations"

# Redirect R temp files to D: drive (avoids C: drive space/permission issues).
# openxlsx saveWorkbook() writes through tempdir() before moving to target.
conf_abs <- normalizePath(confdir, mustWork = FALSE)
if (!dir.exists(conf_abs)) dir.create(conf_abs, recursive = TRUE)
Sys.setenv(TMPDIR = conf_abs, TMP = conf_abs, TEMP = conf_abs)

# Write xlsx to a fresh temp file then copy to target.
# This bypasses Windows file-lock errors when a file is open in Excel.
safe_save_xlsx <- function(wb, target_path) {
  tmp <- tempfile(fileext = ".xlsx")
  on.exit(try(file.remove(tmp), silent = TRUE))
  openxlsx::saveWorkbook(wb, tmp, overwrite = TRUE)
  if (file.exists(target_path))
    try(file.remove(target_path), silent = TRUE)
  file.copy(tmp, target_path, overwrite = TRUE)
  invisible(target_path)
}

# Load cleaned monkey data
dat <- read.csv(
  file.path(datdir, "Monkey", "mAb_data_clean.csv"),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE, na.strings = ""
)

cat("Molecules:", paste(sort(unique(dat$Molecule)), collapse = ", "), "\n")
cat("Total rows:", nrow(dat), "\n")
```

```{r v3-params}
#| warning: false

# Load Monkey Parameters.xlsx (long format: one row per parameter per drug)
params_long <- read.xlsx(file.path(datdir, "Monkey", "Parameters.xlsx"), sheet = 1)
names(params_long) <- c("Drug.Name", "Target.Name", "Parameter.Name",
                         "Value", "Unit", "Source", "Method")

# Load Human Parameters.xlsx — same structure, one parameter differs per drug
params_long_human <- read.xlsx(file.path(datdir, "Human", "Parameters_human.xlsx"), sheet = 1)
names(params_long_human) <- c("Drug.Name", "Target.Name", "Parameter.Name",
                               "Value", "Unit", "Source", "Method")

# Target receptor -> PKML file mapping (monkey and human variants)
pkml_map_monkey <- c(
  "PD-L1" = "PKML_Files_Monkey/PKML_Files_Monkey/AntiPDL1.pkml",
  "PD-1"  = "PKML_Files_Monkey/PKML_Files_Monkey/AntiPD1.pkml",
  "VEGFA" = "PKML_Files_Monkey/PKML_Files_Monkey/AntiVEGFA.pkml",
  "IL-6R" = "PKML_Files_Monkey/PKML_Files_Monkey/AntiIL6R.pkml",
  "TNFA"  = "PKML_Files_Monkey/PKML_Files_Monkey/AntiTNFA.pkml"
)
pkml_map_human <- c(
  "PD-L1" = "PKML_Files_Human/PKML_Files_Human/AntiPDL1.pkml",
  "PD-1"  = "PKML_Files_Human/PKML_Files_Human/AntiPD1.pkml",
  "VEGFA" = "PKML_Files_Human/PKML_Files_Human/AntiVEGFA.pkml",
  "IL-6R" = "PKML_Files_Human/PKML_Files_Human/AntiIL6R.pkml",
  "TNFA"  = "PKML_Files_Human/PKML_Files_Human/AntiTNFA.pkml"
)

# Parameter name -> Container Path (confirmed from V2 manual ModelParameters.xlsx)
container_map <- c(
  "Kd (FcRn) in endosomal space" = "mAb",
  "Kd"                           = "mAb-Target-InVitro",
  "koff"                         = "mAb-Target-InVitro",
  "kint"                         = "Complex Internalization",
  "kdeg"                         = "Target degradation",
  "Reference concentration"      = "Target"
)

# Parameter name -> Units (confirmed from V2 manual ModelParameters.xlsx)
unit_map <- c(
  "Kd (FcRn) in endosomal space" = "µmol/l",
  "Kd"                           = "µmol/l",
  "koff"                         = "1/min",
  "kint"                         = "1/h",
  "kdeg"                         = "1/h",
  "Reference concentration"      = "nmol/l"
)

# Drug -> PKML lookup (monkey)
drug_pkml_monkey <- params_long %>%
  distinct(Drug.Name, Target.Name) %>%
  mutate(Species.label = "Monkey", PKML.File = pkml_map_monkey[Target.Name])

# Drug -> PKML lookup (human)
drug_pkml_human <- params_long_human %>%
  distinct(Drug.Name, Target.Name) %>%
  mutate(Species.label = "Human", PKML.File = pkml_map_human[Target.Name])

drug_pkml <- bind_rows(drug_pkml_monkey, drug_pkml_human)

cat("\nDrug-to-PKML mapping:\n")
print(drug_pkml)
```

```{r v3-scenarios-build}
#| warning: false

# Monkey scenarios — driven by observed NHP data (one scenario per Molecule x Dose)
scenarios_monkey <- dat %>%
  distinct(Molecule, Dose) %>%
  mutate(Species.label = "Monkey") %>%
  left_join(drug_pkml_monkey %>% select(Drug.Name, PKML.File),
            by = c("Molecule" = "Drug.Name"))

# Human scenarios — driven by human observed data (clinical doses, NOT monkey doses)
# SC routes excluded: the PBPK model is IV-only; SC data cannot be compared.
# Adalimumab IV data (Broeder 2001, 5 doses) is now included.
dat_human_obs <- read.csv(
  file.path(datdir, "Human", "mAb_data_human.csv"),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE, na.strings = ""
)

scenarios_human <- dat_human_obs %>%
  filter(!grepl("^SC$", trimws(Route), ignore.case = TRUE)) %>%
  distinct(Molecule, Dose) %>%
  mutate(Species.label = "Human") %>%
  left_join(drug_pkml_human %>% select(Drug.Name, PKML.File),
            by = c("Molecule" = "Drug.Name"))

scenarios <- bind_rows(scenarios_monkey, scenarios_human) %>%
  mutate(Sheet.name = paste(Molecule, Species.label, Dose, "mpk", sep = "_")) %>%
  arrange(Molecule, Species.label, Dose)

missing_pkml <- scenarios %>% filter(is.na(PKML.File))
if (nrow(missing_pkml) > 0)
  warning("No PKML mapped for: ", paste(unique(missing_pkml$Molecule), collapse = ", "))
scenarios <- scenarios %>% filter(!is.na(PKML.File))

cat("\nScenarios to configure:", nrow(scenarios), "\n")
print(scenarios %>% select(Molecule, Species.label, Dose, PKML.File))
```

```{r v3-applications}
#| warning: false

# ── Applications.xlsx ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# One sheet per scenario. Container path confirmed from V2 manual file.
# All routes treated as 1-min bolus approximation (as per V2 convention).

APP_CONTAINER <- "Events|IV_Bolus|Application_1|ProtocolSchemaItem"

wb_app <- createWorkbook()

for (i in seq_len(nrow(scenarios))) {
  s  <- scenarios[i, ]
  df <- data.frame(
    `Container Path`     = APP_CONTAINER,
    `Parameter Name`     = "DosePerBodyWeight",
    Value                = s$Dose,
    Units                = "mg/kg",
    `Infusion time`      = 1,
    `Infusion time unit` = "min",
    check.names = FALSE, stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  addWorksheet(wb_app, s$Sheet.name)
  writeData(wb_app, s$Sheet.name, df)
  setColWidths(wb_app, s$Sheet.name, cols = 1:6,
               widths = c(55, 22, 8, 8, 14, 18))
}

app_path <- file.path(confdir, "Applications.xlsx")
safe_save_xlsx(wb_app, app_path)
message("Applications.xlsx written: ", nrow(scenarios), " sheets")
```

```{r v3-model-params}
#| warning: false

# ── ModelParameters.xlsx ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# One sheet per Molecule x Species, plus a Global sheet (empty).
# Confirmed structure from V2 manual file: 6 parameters per sheet, short paths.

PARAM_NAMES <- c("Kd (FcRn) in endosomal space", "Kd", "koff",
                  "kint", "kdeg", "Reference concentration")

mol_species <- scenarios %>% distinct(Molecule, Species.label)

wb_mp <- createWorkbook()

# Global sheet — required by esqlabsR; empty = no project-wide overrides
addWorksheet(wb_mp, "Global")
writeData(wb_mp, "Global",
          data.frame(`Container Path` = NA_character_,
                     `Parameter Name` = NA_character_,
                     Value = NA_real_, Units = NA_character_,
                     check.names = FALSE))

for (i in seq_len(nrow(mol_species))) {
  mol  <- mol_species$Molecule[i]
  spec <- mol_species$Species.label[i]

  # Use human parameters file for human scenarios, monkey file for monkey
  param_source <- if (spec == "Human") params_long_human else params_long

  mol_rows <- param_source %>%
    filter(Drug.Name == mol, Parameter.Name %in% PARAM_NAMES) %>%
    mutate(Parameter.Name = factor(Parameter.Name, levels = PARAM_NAMES)) %>%
    arrange(Parameter.Name) %>%
    transmute(
      `Container Path` = container_map[as.character(Parameter.Name)],
      `Parameter Name` = as.character(Parameter.Name),
      Value            = as.numeric(Value),
      Units            = unit_map[as.character(Parameter.Name)]
    )

  sheet_nm <- paste0(mol, "_", spec)
  addWorksheet(wb_mp, sheet_nm)
  writeData(wb_mp, sheet_nm, mol_rows)
  setColWidths(wb_mp, sheet_nm, cols = 1:4, widths = c(28, 32, 12, 10))
}

mp_path <- file.path(confdir, "ModelParameters.xlsx")
safe_save_xlsx(wb_mp, mp_path)
message("ModelParameters.xlsx written: ", nrow(mol_species),
        " molecule x species sheets + Global")
```

```{r v3-scenarios}
#| warning: false

# ── Scenarios.xlsx ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# SimulationTime format confirmed from V2: multi-segment for high resolution
# in the first 12 h post-dose, then lower resolution for days 1-28.
SIM_TIME <- "0, 12, 12;  13, 672, 28 "

scen_sheet <- scenarios %>%
  transmute(
    Scenario_name         = Sheet.name,
    IndividualId          = NA_character_,
    PopulationId          = NA_character_,
    ReadPopulationFromCSV = NA_character_,
    ModelParameterSheets  = paste0('"Global", "', Molecule, "_", Species.label, '"'),
    ApplicationProtocol   = Sheet.name,
    SimulationTime        = SIM_TIME,
    SimulationTimeUnit    = "h",
    SteadyState           = NA_character_,
    SteadyStateTime       = NA_character_,
    SteadyStateTimeUnit   = NA_character_,
    ModelFile             = PKML.File,
    OutputPathsIds        = "PVB"
  )

output_paths <- data.frame(
  OutputPathId = "PVB",
  OutputPath   = "Organism|PeripheralVenousBlood|mAb|Plasma (Peripheral Venous Blood)",
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

wb_scen <- createWorkbook()
addWorksheet(wb_scen, "Scenarios")
writeData(wb_scen, "Scenarios", scen_sheet)
setColWidths(wb_scen, "Scenarios", cols = 1:13,
             widths = c(32, 12, 12, 20, 30, 32, 22, 18, 12, 14, 18, 20, 14))
addWorksheet(wb_scen, "OutputPaths")
writeData(wb_scen, "OutputPaths", output_paths)
setColWidths(wb_scen, "OutputPaths", cols = 1:2, widths = c(22, 65))

scen_path <- file.path(confdir, "Scenarios.xlsx")
safe_save_xlsx(wb_scen, scen_path)
message("Scenarios.xlsx written: ", nrow(scen_sheet), " scenarios")
```

```{r v3-verify}
# ── Verification ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
conf_files <- c("Applications.xlsx", "ModelParameters.xlsx", "Scenarios.xlsx")

tibble::tibble(
  File    = conf_files,
  Exists  = file.exists(file.path(confdir, conf_files)),
  Size_KB = round(file.size(file.path(confdir, conf_files)) / 1024, 1)
) %>%
  knitr::kable(caption = "Configuration files written to Configurations/") %>%
  kableExtra::kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "condensed"),
                            full_width = FALSE)
```
